name: error-summary
description: Summarize error logs by count and component in a time window
query:
fields @timestamp, @message, kubernetes.namespace_name, kubernetes.pod_name
| filter @message like /(?i)(error|exception|fail|panic)/
| filter kubernetes.namespace_name = '${namespace}'
| stats count(*) as error_count by kubernetes.pod_name, @message
| sort error_count desc
| limit 20
